label: Liquidation Monitor
description: Real-time cascade risk monitor showing at-risk DeFi positions, health factors, and liquidation price proximity.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports — data via useStrategiesData().

0.8.note: context does not expose error; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions.

0.9.note: no dead code. Cascade Zone and 24h Liquidated now computed from context (cascadeZoneUsd, liquidated24hUsd).

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass (0.8 partial). Hardcoded KPI placeholders removed — Cascade Zone + 24h Liquidated read from strategies-data-context.

1.1.note: liquidationPositions sourced exclusively from useStrategiesData() hook.

1.2.note: context calls useGlobalScope() and applies org/client/strategy cascade.

1.3.note: org filter change propagates through context.

1.7.note: liquidation position mock data lives in strategies-data-context.tsx.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time health factor monitoring critical), paper ✓ (simulated positions), batch ✗ (N/A — liquidation risk is a live-only concern).

3.2.note: context reads useExecutionMode() and exposes isLive+mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget shows simulated health factors; read-only — no action buttons.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget. Data is context-driven REST.

3.3.note: Human verify: no order/action buttons in widget (read-only).

3.4.note: Human verify: batch indicator visible in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1, 3.2, 3.5, 3.6 complete. Human must verify 3.3, 3.4.

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers — read-only table, no action buttons.

4.2.note: No href links in this widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.3.note: Human verify: At Risk (count), Cascade Zone (sum debt where HF≤1.2), and 24h Liquidated (rolling 18% heuristic) are all computed in strategies-data-context. Production still needs a real liquidation feed; values are mock but no longer hardcoded strings.

4.4.note: Human verify: column sorting works (HF, liquidationPrice, distancePct).

4.8.note: Human verify: table scrolls within widget bounds.

l4.notes: KPI strip values now context-derived (no hardcoded placeholder strings). Agent checks pass. Human must verify 4.3, 4.4, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: recursive-staked-basis, lending-arb (risk monitoring side), flash-loans (cascade risk). Widget serves defi/risk-monitor family.

l6.notes: L6 not started — deferred until L5 human walkthrough complete.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file; data from context.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: useMemo deps are stable refs. No inline objects in deps.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro on Badge className and span (lines 44, 55, 67). --text-micro (0.625rem/10px) is defined in globals.css @theme inline block.
8.1.fix: Replaced text-[10px] → text-micro at 3 sites (collateral/debt USD spans, HF Badge).

8.3.note: Uses TableWidget (shared), KpiStrip (shared), Badge (ui). Shared primitives.

8.5.note: Human verify: renders at minW=4, minH=4.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (text-micro token applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 human-verify pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Risk monitoring widget with unique health-factor coloring logic and cascade-risk semantics. Separate from LP and lending-arb dashboards which serve different strategy types.

relationships.notes: Standalone read-only table. Also available on risk tab — verify rendering in risk tab layout.

dataContract.notes: In production, liquidation risk data should be WebSocket-driven (real-time health factor updates). Currently static mock in context. Cascade Zone and 24h Liquidated KPIs are derived in context (cascadeZoneUsd = sum(debtUsd where HF≤1.2); liquidated24hUsd = 18% heuristic over mock positions) — heuristic must be replaced by a real feed before prod.

gaps: 24h Liquidated KPI uses an 18% heuristic over mock positions — needs real liquidation-feed integration
No alert/notification on critical HF drop
coverage.notes: Widget is available on risk tab — verify that risk tab layout renders it at appropriate size.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: liquidation-monitor-widget.tsx:44,55,67 — text-[10px] arbitrary font-size on spans and Badge; no text-2xs token in globals.css
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro=0.625rem/10px) at all 3 sites.

findings.description: context does not expose API error field; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions
findings.deferReason: requires context redesign — acceptable for current mock-data phase

findings.description: liquidation-monitor-widget.tsx:113-114 — 'Cascade Zone' ($2,740) and '24h Liquidated' ($4.2M) KPI values are hardcoded strings, not computed from context data
findings.fix: Cascade Zone now renders formatUsd(cascadeZoneUsd); 24h Liquidated renders formatUsd(liquidated24hUsd). Both values come from strategies-data-context (cascadeZoneUsd = sum(debtUsd where HF≤1.2), liquidated24hUsd = 18% heuristic on mock positions).
